description: 🐾 Quick Update! 🐾 Our regular shampoo is currently on backorder, and we're waiting for a shipping update from our supplier. In the meantime, our Flea & Tick shampoo is available and is formulated to help soothe skin and relieve itching. You're also welcome to bring your own shampoo and still enjoy all the conveniences of our self-serve dog wash. Thanks for your patience, and we'll let you know as soon as our regular shampoo is back in stock!

1. 🐾 Quick Update! 🐾 Our regular shampoo is currently on backorder, and we're waiting for a shipping update from our supplier. 2. Self service pet wash station. Located on 121 in Mt. Zion. Wash & dry your pet in one location.
3. Hi is there a pause button for the water to allow time to soap up or when any medicated shampoo says don’t rinse for couple minutes ?
4. Pamela Erwin thanks for reaching out. Unfortunately, there is not a pause button. Once the time starts, much like a car wash, it remains available for use until the time runs out.

Self service pet wash station. Located on 121 in Mt. Zion. Wash & dry your pet in one location.
Hi is there a pause button for the water to allow time to soap up or when any medicated shampoo says don’t rinse for couple minutes ?
Pamela Erwin thanks for reaching out. Unfortunately, there is not a pause button. Once the time starts, much like a car wash, it remains available for use until the time runs out.
